member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState
member.summary: Describes the user-visible state of the optional AI integration.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.Disabled
member.summary: AI requests are disabled by the global setting.

member.summary: The requested capability is independently disabled.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.InvalidContext

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.Connecting
member.summary: The provider is being contacted.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.Connected

member.summary: The provider is reachable but exposes no installed models.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.ModelUnavailable
member.summary: The configured model is not installed or available.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.ModelSelected

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.RequestRunning
member.summary: An AI request is running.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.NoSuggestion
member.summary: The AI returned an explicit, valid no-suggestion result.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.RequestCancelled
member.summary: An AI request was cancelled.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiAvailabilityState.ResponseInvalid

member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?i)(\\"?authorization\\"?\\s*[:=]\\s*\\"?)(?:bearer\\s+)?[^\\s,;\\"]+
Explanation:
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match '"' atomically, optionally.
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Zz].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match '"' atomically, optionally.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [:=].
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match '"' greedily, optionally.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match a character in the set [Bb].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [^",;\s] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Application.AI.AiRequestDiagnosticsStore.SecretPropertyRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?i)(\\"?(?:api[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|password|secret)\\"?\\s*[:=]\\s*\\"?)([^\\",}\\s]+)(\\"?)
Explanation:
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match '"' atomically, optionally.
○ Match with 3 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [-_] atomically, optionally.
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Yy].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [-_] atomically, optionally.
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Ww].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match '"' atomically, optionally.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [:=].
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match '"' atomically, optionally.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^",}\s] atomically at least once.
○ 3rd capture group.
○ Match '"' atomically, optionally.

member.summary: Extracted by a local OCR engine.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.ContentProvenance.DeterministicRule
member.summary: Derived by a deterministic application rule.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.ContentProvenance.UserAccepted
member.summary: Explicitly entered or accepted by the user.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.ContentProvenance.AiSuggestion

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrStatus
member.summary: Identifies the terminal or active state of one OCR attempt.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrStatus.Pending
member.summary: No attempt has been queued.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrStatus.Processing
member.summary: A local engine is processing the input.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrStatus.Completed
member.summary: Useful bounded text was extracted.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrStatus.Skipped
member.summary: OCR was deliberately not needed or not enabled.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrStatus.Failed
member.summary: The attempt failed without stopping the scan.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrStatus.PartiallyCompleted
member.summary: Some text was extracted but a bound or engine warning applied.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrStatus.Unavailable
member.summary: No compatible local engine or rasterizer is available.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrStatus.TextNotIndexedDueToBounds
member.summary: Text was extracted but excluded from indexing by a configured bound.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory
member.summary: Classifies a controlled OCR failure without exposing raw process details.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.None
member.summary: No failure occurred.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.Disabled
member.summary: OCR is disabled by settings.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.EngineUnavailable
member.summary: A compatible local engine is unavailable.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.UnsupportedInput
member.summary: The input type is unsupported by the available capability.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.FileTooLarge
member.summary: The input exceeds the configured byte limit.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.PageLimitExceeded
member.summary: The document exceeds the configured page bound.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.Timeout
member.summary: The bounded operation timed out.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.Cancelled
member.summary: The caller cancelled the operation.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.EngineFailure
member.summary: The local engine reported a controlled failure.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.EmptyText
member.summary: The local engine returned no useful text.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Application.Content.OcrFailureCategory.MalformedInput
member.summary: The input was malformed or unreadable.
